view.title: Validate persona scenario #2

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The requirement to validate the outcome of the persona scenario is not supported by sufficient evidence. While the exploratory step outlines the expectation for deterministic validation of AI-generated parameters, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual validation process or outcome. The linked use cases and prior step evidence do not include specific results or traces that would confirm the scenario behavior as either supported or producing a clear failure report.
